prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工 程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年持续上升：2021年第83名→2024年第70名→2025年第69名→2026年第71名，整体处于中高位稳定区间；2025年声誉评价偏 负面（就业数据引发关注），但2026年周期内未见新增重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第62位，评价为一般，短视频曝光量处于中等水平，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；民族学A+、生态学A、统计学A-，共3个A-及以上学科；与物理类招生专业（计算机类、电子信息类、统计学等）有一定关联，统计学A-对相关专业有加分效应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等物理类主要招生方向在2026年专业热度中均为高热推荐/推荐，报考意愿较强；甘肃省2026年物理类考生约147622人（按 历史比例估算），较2025年121443人增长约21.5%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；云南大学位于云南省，在甘肃省招生 占比极小（近年约0.5%左右），属于典型的跨省招生，地域偏好对甘肃考生报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次19705名、2026年招生计划持平、甘肃省物理类 考生大幅增加约21.5%导致竞争加剧、学校软科排名持续上升对报考有一定正向吸引，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年有所前移（位次数字减小），预测最低位次约19105名，区 间18605–19605名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 9647 → 13492 → 10502 → 12442 → 19705, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2025, it shifted backward by about 7263 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of approximately 19705. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 41 in 2021, 44 in 2022, 44 in 2023, 48 in 2024, and 45 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 45, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science main ranking has been rising in recent years: 83rd in 2021 → 70th in 2024 → 69th in 2025 → 71st in 2026, overall in a stable mid-to-high range. In 2025, reputation evaluation was slightly negative (employment data attracted attention), but no major new negative public opinion emerged in the 2026 cycle. Douyin heat total ranking is 62nd, rated as average, with short video exposure at a medium level, showing no clear signal of increased application interest. It has 3 A- or above disciplines: Ethnology A+, Ecology A, Statistics A-. These are somewhat related to Physics Category admission majors (Computer, Electronic Information, Statistics, etc.), and Statistics A- has a bonus effect on related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other main Physics Category admission directions are all highly recommended/recommended in 2026 major popularity, with strong application willingness. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Gansu Province is approximately 147,622 (estimated by historical proportion), an increase of about 21.5% from 121,443 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. Yunnan University is located in Yunnan Province, with a very small proportion of enrollment in Gansu Province (about 0.5% in recent years), typical of cross-provincial enrollment, and regional preference has limited impact on Gansu candidates' applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 19705, unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a significant increase of about 21.5% in Gansu Physics Category examinees leading to intensified competition, and the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking positively attracting applications, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move forward compared to 2025 (ranking number decreases). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 19105, with a range of 18605–19605.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 1488 → 1691 → 1489 → 5416 → 2694. In 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination, there was a significant fluctuation (5416th place), and in 2025 it stabilized to 2694th place, with a baseline ranking of approximately 2694. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 19 students in 2021, 16 in 2022, 16 in 2023, 15 in 2024, and 14 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 13 students, a decrease of 1 student compared to 2025 (a reduction of about 7.1%). Enrollment quotas continue to shrink slightly, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. The Soft Science main ranking has been rising in recent years, reaching 71st in 2026. The university's comprehensive strength and recognition are steadily improving. In 2025, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (employment data attracted attention), but no significant new negative public opinion emerged in the 2026 cycle. The overall Douyin popularity ranking is 62nd, rated as average, with no clear signal of increased or decreased application interest. Ethnology is A+ (top in the country), Ecology is A, and Statistics is A-. Ethnology has some disciplinary connection with some History Category enrollment majors (such as Political Science and Sociology), which positively attracts applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and other main History Category enrollment directions are all recommended in the 2026 major popularity rankings, with stable application willingness. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Gansu Province is approximately 71,078 (estimated based on historical proportion), an increase of about 21.8% compared to 58,374 in 2025. The examinee scale has significantly expanded, intensifying competition. Yunnan University is located in Yunnan Province, and its History Category enrollment share in Gansu Province is extremely small, so regional preference has limited impact on Gansu examinees' applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2694, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of about 7.1%, the significant increase of about 21.8% in History Category examinees in Gansu Province leading to intensified competition, and the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking which positively attracts applications, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move forward compared to 2025 (ranking number decreases). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2499, with a range of 1999–2999.
